CustomField.formula: IF(OR(ISBLANK(progression_pourcentage__c ), progression_pourcentage__c <= 0), "⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪⚪ 0%", (IF( progression_pourcentage__c >= 0.1, "🟢", "⚪") & IF( progression_pourcentage__c >= 0.2, "🟢", "⚪") & IF( progression_pourcentage__c >= 0.3, "🟢", "⚪") & IF( progression_pourcentage__c >= 0.4, "🟢", "⚪") & IF( progression_pourcentage__c >= 0.5, "🟢", "⚪") & IF( progression_pourcentage__c >= 0.6, "🟢", "⚪") & IF( progression_pourcentage__c >= 0.7, "🟢", "⚪") & IF( progression_pourcentage__c >= 0.8, "🟢", "⚪") & IF( progression_pourcentage__c >= 0.9, "🟢", "⚪") & IF( progression_pourcentage__c >= 1.0, "🟢", "⚪")) /* Utilisation de ROUND pour limiter les décimales */ & " " & TEXT(ROUND(progression_pourcentage__c * 100, 2)) & "%" )
CustomField.label: ⏳ % de traitement des tâches
